response:
* The title accurately reflects the content of the abstract.  
* The abstract discusses the relationship between astrocytic coverage and glutamate clearance.  
* Glutamate clearance is linked to astrocytic coverage of neurons.  
* The study focuses on the rat hypothalamic supraoptic nucleus.  
* Pharmacological reduction in glutamate clearance affects transmitter release.  
* Presynaptic metabotropic glutamate receptors are modulated by glutamate clearance.  
* Astrocytic wrapping influences synaptic efficacy in the central nervous system.  
* The title highlights the role of glial coverage in regulating synaptic efficacy.  
* **Highlighted section**: The title effectively captures the main findings of the study.
